name: USP消音版 | 黑色魅影
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with a stylized blue-magenta woman over a grayscale background. \"Drenched in a neon glow, she lies at the foot of an oppressive skyscraper\"
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器定绘了一名在灰度背景下一身蓝红风格的女子。 “在霓虹灯光下浑身湿透，她躺在一座压抑的摩天大楼脚边”
